message:
fix(window,codec,config): resolve clippy and rustfmt warnings across GUI subsystems

Apply idiomatic patterns: derive(Default) with #[default] on enum
variants, const thread_local init via const { RefCell::new(None) },
.copied(), .is_some_and(), .is_empty(), import reordering, and
multiline assert formatting.

Suppress ObjC-interop clippy lints (not_unsafe_ptr_arg_deref,
mut_from_ref) in macOS FFI modules where raw pointer patterns are
inherent to the objc msg_send! macro. Add Default impl for macOS
Clipboard struct. Remove unnecessary u64 cast on max_fps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
